creator: jhkingsr@gmail.com
text:
Okay... installed bmake... did a make -D ALWAYS_CHECK_MAKE kernel-toolchain which went smoothly... did a make -D ALWAYS_CHECK_MAKE buildkernel which resulted in

--------------------------------------------------------------
>>> Kernel build for GENERIC completed on Thu Jan  7 19:08:27 EST 2016
--------------------------------------------------------------

Here's the results of the boot.
